title: Kleen-Tex Mat, Polyamid, Black, 35x75cm
features: PRODUCTION IN EUROPE: The floor mats are produced in our own factory in Europe; they have a backing made of 100% nitrile rubber and a surface made of a high pile nylon (100% polyamide).
PREMIUM QUALITY: wash+dry mats have been awarded the world-renowned OEKO-TEX Standard 100 for quality and textile safety.

INTERIOR AND OVERCOVERED OUTDOOR: : wash+dry doormats are versatile providing fantastic hygiene benefits and fashionable accents - whether in the kitchen, living room, hallway, inside or outside the front door, at patio doors or even in the boot of cars.
description: From the manufacturer About Kleen-Tex Kleen-Tex is one of the world's leading suppliers of innovative mat solutions. The family business was founded in 1967 in LaGrange, Georgia, USA. The subsidiary in Tyrol/Austria, which has existed since 1995, supplies the European market. Other Kleen-Tex offices in Europe are located in the UK and Poland. Kleen-Tex specialises worldwide in the production of high-quality, washable floor mats for the core areas of living and interior, advertising and events as well as for commercial, industry and hotel. About wash+dry original If you are looking for plain and functional floor mats, wash+dry Original is just the thing. The wash+dry original quality stands for hygiene and function - all plain dirt trapper runners are washable at 60 degrees and suitable for tumble drying and underfloor heating. This makes them perfect for allergy sufferers and pet owners. Your mat pile is made from 100% high quality nylon and its back is made from 100% nitrile rubber. This makes the dirt trapper mat PVC-free and non-slip. The wash+dry floor mats are available in different colours and impress with their high dirt absorption. Yet they are so flat that they fit under almost any door. All wash+dry floor mats are manufactured exclusively in the EU and are awarded the Oeko-Tex Standard 100, which stands for non-toxic and harmless textiles. The manufacturer assures 5 years of "how-new" quality. Care tips for the wash+dry original mat: wash+dry original floor mats are at max. Washable at 60 °C. Please use mild detergent if possible and spin the wash+dry original mat on a low setting. Floor mats up to and including size 115 x 175 cm can be easily washed in a household washing machine. Please check the capacity of your washing machine before washing. Mats with too high weight can be taken to a laundry. Wash+Dry original floor mats are suitable for tumble drying. Simply place the dirt trapper mat in the dryer and choose the program "Easy Care" or "Mixed Fabric". Alternatively, you can also lay the doormat flat on the floor or on a clothes horse to dry. Care for your doormat regularly and you will be surprised how many years of quality . Washing cares for the mat more than stressing it, and its dirt absorption is increased again. Product features of the wash+dry original mat: Finish: 100% polyamide. Back: 100% nitrile rubber, completely PVC-free. Edge width: 1.00 cm. Height: approx. 9 mm. Weight: approx. 1.98 kg/m². Colour brilliance as well as colour and non-fading. Care: Gentle cycle 60°C, tumble dryer-safe at 90°C. Quality note: Oeko-Tex Standard 100 For PVC floors, linoleum, laminate and wooden floors, interaction with rubber-coated mats can lead to a colour change of the surface. Please note our size and colour tolerance of +/- 3%.

specifications_table.Care Instructions: ‎Maintain your Wash+Dry Design doormat 3 to 4 times a year (even more often under heavy loads), The Wash+Dry original mats are washable up to 60 °C in a washing machine., When tumble drying, please max. 90°C or select the "Easy Care" or "Blended Fabric" program., The dirt trapper mats should be washed separately with mild detergent and washed on a low setting with approx. 800 rotations, Alternatively, the doormat can also be laid flat on the floor or on a clothes drying rack.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Please note: this product may contain allergenic substances. Please use it with caution, especially if you are allergic to polyamide or nitrile rubber.
